title: excoecaria bussei
intro: Excoecaria bussei, also known as the yellow oleander, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Africa and Asia, characterized by its yellow flowers and toxic sap. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Excoecaria bussei include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and showing potential anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and infusions, are used to treat various ailments, although it's essential to consult a medical professional before using any plant-based remedies due to its toxic nature.
